name: Priya Sharma
job_description: We are hiring an experienced Salesforce Administrator to manage and enhance our CRM platform.
match_summary: Priya has 3 years of hands-on Salesforce Admin experience with Sales Cloud and Service Cloud. Holds Salesforce Admin certification. Strong fit for the role.
additional_comments: Priya demonstrated excellent communication throughout the interview. She articulated her Salesforce Admin experience clearly and gave specific examples of Flow Builder automations she built at her previous role. Technically solid with deep knowledge of Sales Cloud configuration. Cultural fit is excellent — she showed enthusiasm for the product and asked thoughtful questions about team structure. Recommendation: Proceed to offer stage.

experience_comparison.note: LinkedIn confirms 4+ years at TCS as Salesforce Admin. Consistent with resume.

recent_activity: Posted about Flow Builder best practices

name: Rahul Mehta
job_description: We are hiring an experienced Salesforce Administrator to manage and enhance our CRM platform.
match_summary: Rahul has solid Salesforce support experience with good reporting skills. Lacks deep Flow Builder exposure but has the fundamentals.
additional_comments: Rahul was confident and well-spoken but showed clear gaps in his technical depth. He could speak broadly about Salesforce configuration but struggled when asked about Flow Builder and automation. His support background gives him a good foundation for the Admin role, but he'll need structured onboarding on the automation side. Culture fit is decent — he's professional and collaborative. Recommend hiring with a 3-month ramp plan focusing on Flow and automation skills.

call_status.note: Candidate did not answer. Email sent.

experience_comparison.note: Resume claims 3 years experience but LinkedIn shows only 1.5 years in Salesforce roles. Discrepancy detected.

name: Sneha Patel
job_description: We are hiring an experienced Salesforce Administrator to manage and enhance our CRM platform.
match_summary: Sneha has basic CRM experience but limited Salesforce-specific skills. Would need significant onboarding for the Admin role.

name: Arjun Kumar
job_description: We are looking for a skilled Salesforce Developer to design and build custom solutions on the Salesforce platform.
match_summary: Arjun brings 4 years of strong Salesforce development experience including Apex, LWC, and third-party integrations. Excellent technical fit.
additional_comments: Arjun is a standout candidate. He demonstrated deep Apex knowledge, explained complex trigger frameworks confidently, and showed a solid grasp of integration patterns using REST and Named Credentials. His LWC samples showed clean, component-driven thinking. The only minor gap was limited Experience Cloud exposure, which he acknowledged proactively. Culture fit is strong — he's collaborative, intellectually curious, and eager to mentor junior developers. Highly recommend for immediate offer.

name: Kavya Nair
job_description: We are looking for a skilled Salesforce Developer to design and build custom solutions on the Salesforce platform.
match_summary: Kavya has strong Apex skills and good LWC experience. Integration experience is limited but she demonstrates solid fundamentals.

name: Vikram Singh
job_description: We are looking for a skilled Salesforce Developer to design and build custom solutions on the Salesforce platform.
match_summary: Vikram has basic Apex knowledge but lacks LWC and integration experience. Long notice period may be a constraint.

name: Anita Desai
job_description: We are seeking a detail-oriented QA Engineer to ensure the quality of our software products.
match_summary: Anita has 4 years of QA experience with strong automation and API testing skills. Excellent match for the Mumbai hybrid role.
additional_comments: Anita came prepared with detailed examples of her automation frameworks and gave a live walkthrough of a Selenium test she wrote. Her understanding of the SDLC and defect lifecycle is thorough. She asked intelligent questions about our release cycle and CI/CD pipeline. SQL is a minor gap but she expressed willingness to upskill quickly. Very strong candidate — recommend moving to offer.

name: Rohan Sharma
job_description: We are seeking a detail-oriented QA Engineer to ensure the quality of our software products.
match_summary: Rohan has solid manual testing background and is learning automation. Good cultural fit for a growing QA team.

name: Pooja Gupta
job_description: We are seeking a detail-oriented QA Engineer to ensure the quality of our software products.
match_summary: Pooja has basic manual testing skills but lacks automation and API testing experience required for this role.

name: Deepak Verma
job_description: We are looking for a Business Analyst to bridge the gap between business needs and technical solutions.
match_summary: Deepak has 5 years of BA experience with strong stakeholder management and process mapping skills. Salesforce CRM background is a bonus.
additional_comments: Deepak is a polished communicator who clearly understands the BA role end-to-end. He walked through a real process improvement initiative he led at his current company and demonstrated a data-driven approach to identifying inefficiencies. His Salesforce CRM background is an unexpected plus for this role. The 45-day notice is a minor concern but he indicated flexibility if the offer is strong. Strong hire recommendation.

name: Meera Joshi
job_description: We are looking for a Business Analyst to bridge the gap between business needs and technical solutions.
match_summary: Meera has good BA fundamentals with experience in Agile environments. Solid JIRA and user story skills.

name: Sanjay Rao
job_description: We are looking for a Business Analyst to bridge the gap between business needs and technical solutions.
match_summary: Sanjay is a junior BA with limited hands-on experience. Shows promise but needs mentoring to meet the 3-6 year experience requirement.

name: Ananya Krishnan
job_description: We are seeking a detail-oriented QA Engineer to ensure the quality of our software products.
match_summary: Ananya has basic manual testing knowledge but lacks automation skills and technical depth required for the role.
additional_comments: Ananya showed genuine enthusiasm but unfortunately did not demonstrate the minimum technical competency expected for the QA Engineer role. Her answers on automation were largely theoretical with no practical examples. API testing concepts were unfamiliar to her. After panel discussion, the team agreed she is better suited for a junior/internship-track role. Recommend rejection for this position but may revisit in 12-18 months if she builds her automation skills.

experience_comparison.note: LinkedIn profile URL provided but profile appears to be private or deleted.

name: Vikram Nair
job_description: We are looking for a skilled Salesforce Developer to design and build custom solutions on the Salesforce platform.
match_summary: Vikram is technically strong with real Apex and integration experience. Minor dip on system design questions but recovered well.
additional_comments: Vikram showed strong command of Apex and Platform Events. He struggled briefly with multi-org architecture questions but corrected himself and demonstrated he understood the concepts. His CI/CD experience with SFDX and GitHub Actions is a real asset. Communication was clear and structured. Compensation expectations are slightly above band but within negotiation range. Recommend hire.

call_status.note: Candidate asked about interview format. Informed about AI interview.

experience_comparison.note: LinkedIn shows additional experience not on resume. Senior roles at Infosys and TCS confirmed.

recent_activity: Published article: CI/CD Best Practices in Salesforce
Spoke at Salesforce Mumbai User Group

name: Ishaan Patel
job_description: We are looking for a Data Engineer to build and maintain our data infrastructure.
match_summary: Ishaan has 4 years of data engineering experience with expert-level Python, Spark, and Airflow skills. Has built end-to-end data pipelines for two unicorn-stage startups. Exceptional technical fit.
additional_comments: Ishaan is one of the strongest data engineering candidates we have seen. He gave a detailed walkthrough of a real-time pipeline he built using Kafka and Spark Streaming at his previous company, handling 50M+ events/day. His understanding of data modeling, partition strategies, and incremental loads using dbt is impressive. Communication is sharp and technical explanations are crystal clear. Highly recommend moving to offer immediately — risk of losing him to competing offers is high.

call_status.note: Candidate confirmed slot and asked about tech stack details

experience_comparison.note: LinkedIn confirms senior data engineering roles at Meesho and Razorpay. Fully consistent with resume.

She is confident, data-driven, and clearly understands the full-funnel B2B buyer journey. Her limited SEM experience is a gap but she has a plan to close it. Notice period and compensation are slightly above band — recommend negotiation before extending offer. Overall a strong hire.

name: Suresh Menon
job_description: We are looking for a React Frontend Developer to build responsive, high-performance web applications.
match_summary: Suresh is an exceptional frontend engineer with 5 years of React and TypeScript experience. Contributed to multiple high-traffic consumer products. Outstanding technical fit.
additional_comments: Suresh is easily the strongest frontend candidate we have interviewed. He demonstrated deep React internals knowledge — explaining reconciliation, concurrent mode, and memoization with precision. His live coding session was flawless: he built a complex paginated data grid with virtualization in under 30 minutes. He has led the migration of a legacy codebase to React 18 at his current company. Culture fit is excellent — calm, methodical, loves mentoring. Compensation is slightly above band but he's worth every rupee. Extend offer immediately.

call_status.note: Confirmed slot and asked about the tech stack used

experience_comparison.note: LinkedIn confirms senior frontend roles at Flipkart and Cred. Fully consistent with resume.

Published blog: React Server Components in Production

name: Gaurav Tiwari
job_description: We are looking for a Salesforce Developer to build and customize solutions on the Salesforce platform.
match_summary: Gaurav is an elite-level Salesforce Developer with 6 years of experience spanning Apex, LWC, Experience Cloud, MuleSoft integrations, and multi-org architecture. A genuinely exceptional candidate.
match_gaps: Compensation expectations at the top of the band
additional_comments: Gaurav is the strongest Salesforce Developer candidate we have ever screened. His command of the platform is encyclopedic — he explained governor limit optimization strategies, multi-org B2C Commerce integrations with MuleSoft, and Experience Cloud site architecture without hesitation. His GitHub has impressive open-source Salesforce utilities with 400+ stars. In the cultural interview, he demonstrated servant leadership and a passion for knowledge sharing through the Salesforce developer community. Compensation is top of band but fully justified. Extend offer at the top of the range immediately.

call_status.note: Candidate is very interested — mentioned he has two other competing offers

experience_comparison.note: LinkedIn confirms lead and senior developer roles at Accenture and Deloitte Digital. Exceeds resume claims.

recent_activity: Wrote community blog: Multi-org Strategy for B2B Commerce

name: Neha Jain
job_description: We are hiring an AI/ML Engineer to build intelligent features into our product.
match_summary: Neha has 4 years of ML engineering experience with solid NLP, PyTorch, and MLOps skills. Her LLM API integration work at her current company is directly relevant.
additional_comments: Neha is a strong ML engineer with a clear talent for translating business problems into model architectures. She demonstrated her RAG pipeline work using LangChain and OpenAI embeddings, which is directly relevant to our planned AI features. She explained model evaluation and drift detection clearly and showed familiarity with MLflow for experiment tracking. Her vector database experience is limited but she has used FAISS at a basic level. Culture fit is excellent — she's curious, collaborative, and energetic. Recommend extending offer.

name: Karan Malhotra
job_description: We are seeking a Customer Success Manager to build lasting relationships with our enterprise clients.
match_summary: Karan has account management experience in a non-SaaS context. Lacks technical depth and SaaS-specific customer success skills required for the role.
match_gaps: No churn prevention or product adoption track record
additional_comments: Karan is personable and has basic relationship management instincts, but he could not demonstrate understanding of key SaaS CSM concepts like product adoption metrics, churn signals, health scores, or QBRs. His prior account management was in a telecom context with little overlap to our enterprise SaaS environment. He was also unable to articulate a structured approach to onboarding new customers or managing escalations. The panel unanimously agreed he does not meet the bar for this role. Recommend rejection.

experience_comparison.note: Resume claims 3 years of customer success experience but LinkedIn shows 2 years in telecom account management — different domain and skillset.
